description: Fetch AI-suggested questions/prompts to ask a notebook (wrapped [[ [title, prompt], ... ]] envelope). NOTE: response.allow_null is false here (the fixture pins a live, non-null decode); production rpc_call uses allow_null=True to tolerate a null payload. This fixture-vs-production split mirrors GET_SUGGESTED_REPORTS — see test_rpc_golden_payloads.py (the allow_null cross-check comment).

- Focus on enterprise use cases."],["Process Timeline","
- Present the history of the product as a timeline.
- Highlight major milestones."]]]
